key_findings.what: Marketplace empty for anonymous visitors (and cross-employer browsing): employer_profiles has no anon SELECT policy, so the employer_profiles!inner join in JobSearch.tsx prunes every job. Proven via PostgREST as anon: jobs visible alone, [] with the join. Launch blocker for visitor acquisition.
key_findings.loc: JobSearch.tsx:259 (!inner, HOMEBUG-03); employer_profiles policies (migration 002); e2e guard: seeker-browse-jobs.spec.ts test.fail()
key_findings.resolution: 8bfbe08 — migration 038 APPLIED (operator-selected view approach): marketplace_employer_profiles exposes 10/39 visitor-rendered columns for non-draft-listing employers; 4 embed sites repointed incl. FeaturedListings (landing also affected); anon-verified via PostgREST; e2e guard live (test.fail removed, passes genuinely)

key_findings.what: Pre-existing: the 'seekers can view' policy grants any seeker account ALL 39 employer_profiles columns including stripe_customer_id and user_id. Surfaced during RLS-MKT-01 column inventory. Consider repointing seeker reads at the 038 view (or a wider seeker view) and narrowing the policy.
key_findings.loc: employer_profiles policy "seekers can view" (migration 002); column list in session log 2026-06-10

Secret hygiene: clean scans, .env untracked + documented .env.example
